Pre-Natal Epoch 89
The first gives 10.17.8 P.M. on 1919.4.14 and the other
gives 10.2.46 A.M. on the next day. These are in local time.
The second time is for April 15,1919. Moon's longitude at
10.17.8 P.M. (LM1) on 1919.4.14 is = 173 deg.53'.11·6 •. The
S.T. for this would be 7.10.23· 83 We deduct S.T. at noon on
1920.1.21.

LMT 11.12.54·002 AM
The time given earlier was 11.6.4235 A.M. (LMT). This
very time subjected to the same procedure gives 11.12.54 A.M.
(LMT).
Thus the prenatal Epoch theory; is of doubtful value.

Directions: Preliminaries
There are some who hold that Primary or Seoondary direc
tions can rectify the time of birth. This needs a close examina
tion.
